@grandpa: person "爷爷"

@aunt: person "小姨"

# 爷爷奶奶

# 爸爸和兄弟

# 妈妈和小姨

note($a1, "做得挺大的")
$x1 = cousin(@self, @xiaohao)

$x3 = coworker(@xiaohao, @aunt)
note($x3, "小豪跟着小姨做生意")

# 自己和家庭

note($s9, "刚上幼儿园")

@zr: person "周然"
@sz: place "深圳"
@hw: org "华为"
@zd: org "浙大"
@sq: person "苏晴"
@tx: org "腾讯"
@sh: place "上海"
@hz: place "杭州"
@ali: org "阿里"
@bd: org "北大"
@lz: person "老赵"
@lucky: animal "Lucky"
@mochi: animal "Mochi"
@hs: place "黄山"
@sy: place "三亚"
@my: place "绵阳"
@mom: person
# 周然 - 弟弟，算法工程师，华为，深圳，浙大毕业
$r1 = brother(@self, @zr)
$r2 = name(@zr, "周然")
$r3 = occupation(@zr, "算法工程师")
$r4 = work_at(@zr, @hw)
$r5 = location(@zr, @sz)
$r6 = education(@zr, "浙大")
$r6t = time($r6, "去年毕业")
# 周然不喜欢当前工作，压力大
$r7 = dislike(@zr, "当前工作")
note($r7, "压力太大")
$r8 = want(@zr, "转做独立开发者")
# 苏晴 - 周然女朋友，产品经理，腾讯（已更正）
$r9 = partner(@zr, @sq)
$r10 = name(@sq, "苏晴")
$r11 = occupation(@sq, "产品经理")
$c1 = correct_intent(@self, $r11)
$r12 = work_at(@sq, @tx)
# 周然没订婚，只是在考虑
$r13 = retract_intent(@self, "周然跟苏晴订婚了")
$r14 = undecided(@zr, "跟苏晴订婚")
# 周然打算明年在三亚办婚礼
$r15 = plan(@zr, "办婚礼")
$r15t = time($r15, "明年")
$r15l = location($r15, @sy)
# 妈妈
$r16 = mother(@self, @mom)
# 自己 - 数据分析师，上海，北大统计学硕士
$s1 = occupation(@self, "数据分析师")
$s2 = live_in(@self, @sh)
$s3 = education(@self, "北大统计学硕士")
$s4 = work_at(@self, @ali)
$s4t = duration($s4, "两年")
note($s4, "之前在杭州的阿里干过")
# 老赵 - 室友，后端开发，养两条狗
$z1 = roommate(@self, @lz)
$z2 = name(@lz, "老赵")
$z3 = occupation(@lz, "后端开发")
$z4 = pet(@lz, @lucky)
$z5 = pet(@lz, @mochi)
$z6 = name(@lucky, "Lucky")
$z7 = name(@mochi, "Mochi")
note(@lucky, "拉布拉多")
note(@mochi, "柯基")
# 周末一起徒步
$z8 = hobby(@self, "徒步")
$z9 = hobby(@lz, "徒步")
$z8f = frequency($z8, "周末经常")
# 上个月黄山之行
$e1 = visit(@self, @hs)
$e1p1 = visit(@lz, @hs)
$e1p2 = visit(@zr, @hs)
$e1p3 = visit(@sq, @hs)
$e1t = time($e1, "上个月")
note($e1, "在山顶看了日出")
# 饮食偏好
$f1 = eat(@self, "海鲜")
$f2 = neg($f1)
note($f2, "过敏")
$f3 = like(@self, "川菜")
# 四川人，老家绵阳
$f4 = nationality(@self, "四川人")
$f5 = live_in(@self, @my)
note($f5, "老家")
# 老赵辞职，准备去日本读CS博士
$z10 = resign(@lz, "工作")
$z10t = time($z10, "上周")
$z11 = plan(@lz, "去日本读CS博士")
note($z4, "Lucky和Mochi暂时让老赵妈妈帮忙养着")
